suggestion_text: Deploy static patrol units at Colaba Causeway and Gateway tourist points.
Increase bike patrols on Linking Road during evening peak hours.
Station traffic interceptors on Eastern Express Highway post-midnight.
Enhance night patrolling (11 PM - 3 AM) in residential pockets.
Crowd control measures recommended near Dadar Station flower market.
Conduct spot checks at MIDC entry points during late evening shifts.
Maintain standard beat marshall rounds; no specific surge required.
Increase vigilance near Juhu Beach entrance on weekends.
